author: lOrm
content: Landed src/tools/powershell.rs (pwsh preferred, powershell.exe fallback). Same safety posture as bash: validate_command length cap + denylist via bash::validate_command, PS-specific denylist via powershell_denied_reason() catching Format-Volume/Clear-Disk, IEX-on-downloaded-string RCE, -EncodedCommand payloads, Remove-Item -Recurse -Force of root. apply_env_scrub strips credentials. Bounded timeout (default 120s, max 600s, polled via try_wait). 9 tests pin denylist coverage + dispatch paths. Registered as 'powershell' with PermissionTarget canonical='Bash' arg_key='command' so existing Bash rules cover it.
